assumptions: UF = 0.67 from standard reflectance table — confirm from photometric data
MF = 0.80 for clean office LED — confirm cleaning schedule with FM

drawing_notes: All luminaires: 600×600 LED recessed panel, 4500 lm, 36W, 4000K, CRI ≥ 80
Maintained illuminance: 500 lux, UGR ≤ 19 per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3
Ceiling grid: 600mm module assumed — confirm from architect's reflected ceiling plan

rationale.chat_summary: 20 × 600×600 LED panel layout for 80 m² open-plan office. Target 500 lx achieved at 603 lx (UF=0.67, MF=0.80); single 6 A Type C circuit on DB L1 at 720 W. Two assumptions on UF and MF flagged — confirm against the luminaire's photometric datasheet. Reply to refine, e.g. 'use LED downlights instead'.

sections.title: Illumination
sections.summary: Target 500 lx (open-plan office, BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3); achieved 603 lx maintained.

decisions.label: Lux target 500 lx maintained
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 entry for open_plan_office sets 500 lx.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 entry for open_plan_office

decisions.label: UGR ≤ 19 (confirm from photometric)
decisions.summary: Table 5.3 sets UGR limit 19 for office work; lumen method cannot verify — confirm from the luminaire's UGR table.

sections.title: Layout
sections.summary: 20 luminaires on a 4-wide × 5-deep grid; 50 mm snap; ceiling grid 600 mm respected.

decisions.label: N = 17 minimum from lumen method, rounded up to 20 for grid symmetry
decisions.summary: Lumen method gives 16.58; rounded UP to 17; 20 chosen to fill the 4×5 grid evenly.

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: Single 6 A Type C MCB on DB L1; load 720 W is 39 % of the 1840 W 80%-rule headroom.

decisions.label: 6 A Type C MCB on DB L1
decisions.summary: 20 × 36 W = 720 W well within 230 V × 6 A × 0.8 = 1104 W; chose 6 A to leave 10 A headroom for shared neutrals.

sections.title: Switching
sections.summary: Single 1-gang switch at the entrance, latch-side, 1200 mm AFF.

decisions.label: Switch at room entrance, latch side, 1200 mm AFF
decisions.summary: BS 7671 requires switching within reach of the entry door; placed on the latch side for accessibility.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Two design assumptions — must be confirmed against the photometric datasheet before issue.

decisions.label: UF = 0.67
decisions.summary: From CIBSE SLL standard reflectance table 0.7/0.5/0.2 for an indoor office.

decisions.label: MF = 0.80
decisions.summary: Clean office LED on a 3-year cleaning cycle.
decisions.rule: CIBSE TM 3-25 / standard MF for clean office LED
